## Task Description

What task did you want SkillLayer to handle?

## Current Workaround

How do you or your coding agent handle this today?

## Frequency

How often does this task happen?

- [ ] Rarely
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Many times per day

## Pain Level

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Blocking

## Current Agent Behavior

Does your current agent handle this poorly?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Not sure

What goes wrong?

## Privacy Note

Please avoid sharing private repository code, secrets, credentials, raw diffs, or
unreviewed telemetry exports.
